title: JIT code cache and invalidation
purpose: Compiled native code must be cached and invalidated when modules are hot-reloaded. The code cache maps (module, function, arity, generation) to compiled code. Hot code loading (B-041-B-045) increments the generation, invalidating cached code for the old version.
task: Implement the JIT code cache with generation-aware invalidation.

requirements.title: Code cache
requirements.spec: Cache compiled code keyed by (module, function, arity, generation).

requirements.title: Generation-based invalidation
requirements.spec: Invalidate cached code when a module is reloaded.
acceptance: hot_load_module triggers cache eviction for the old generation
New calls to the function compile fresh against the new bytecode
Old compiled code is deallocated when no longer referenced
Test: compile function, reload module, verify old code evicted

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement code cache size limits — unbounded for now
SHALL NOT implement speculative deoptimization — simple cache invalidation only
verification: cargo test -p beamr passes with all tests green
